title: coryanthes wenzeliana
intro: Coryanthes wenzeliana, also known as the Philippine pitcher plant, is a species of carnivorous plant that belongs to the family of Nepenthaceae. Traditionally, Coryanthes wenzeliana has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and respiratory infections. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as provide relief from coughs and sore throats. In herbal preparations, Coryanthes wenzeliana is often used in teas and infusions, as well as being applied topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
